mapper.insert: INSERT INTO music_comment(music_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{musicId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM music_comment c JOIN app_user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.music_id = #{musicId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE music_rating_stat SET star1_count = star1_count + IF(#{star} = 1, 1, 0), star2_count = star2_count + IF(#{star} = 2, 1, 0), star3_count = star3_count + IF(#{star} = 3, 1, 0), star4_count = star4_count + IF(#{star} = 4, 1, 0), star5_count = star5_count + IF(#{star} = 5, 1, 0), rating_count = rating_count + 1, rating_sum = rating_sum + #{star} WHERE music_id = #{musicId}
mapper.select: SELECT star1_count, star2_count, star3_count, star4_count, star5_count, rating_count, rating_sum, IF(rating_count = 0, 0, rating_sum / rating_count) AS avg_score FROM music_rating_stat WHERE music_id = #{musicId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO music_user_rating(user_id, music_id, star) VALUES (#{userId}, #{musicId}, #{star})
mapper.update: UPDATE music_rating_stat SET star1_count = star1_count + (CASE WHEN #{oldStar} = 1 THEN -1 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN #{newStar} = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), star2_count = star2_count + (CASE WHEN #{oldStar} = 2 THEN -1 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN #{newStar} = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), star3_count = star3_count + (CASE WHEN #{oldStar} = 3 THEN -1 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN #{newStar} = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), star4_count = star4_count + (CASE WHEN #{oldStar} = 4 THEN -1 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN #{newStar} = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), star5_count = star5_count + (CASE WHEN #{oldStar} = 5 THEN -1 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN #{newStar} = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), rating_sum = rating_sum - #{oldStar} + #{newStar} WHERE music_id = #{musicId}
